videos.title: Predictions don't just forecast the future — they shape it #TEDTalks
videos.author: TED
videos.description: What do the story of Oedipus and your insurance premiums have in common? They are both driven by self-fulfilling prophecies. videos.title: The Love of My Life (and Why I Need to Share It with You) | Ann Patchett | TED
videos.author: TED
videos.description: If you want to live in a world where people read, novelist Ann Patchett has news for you: it's your job to help create that reality. videos.author: TED
videos.description: Octopus, squid and cuttlefish -- collectively known as cephalopods -- have strange, massive, distributed brains. What do they do with all that neural power? videos.title: We’re Keeping the Ocean Wild — and You Can Join Us | Sylvia A. Earle | TED
videos.author: TED
videos.description: In 2009, marine biologist Sylvia Earle stood on the TED stage and made a wish: to build a global network of "Hope Spots" and protect the ocean before it's too late. videos.title: How to Google Your Symptoms Without Freaking Out | John Whyte | TED
videos.author: TED
videos.description: Why does searching your symptoms online always leave you more frightened than before?
